samples.responseBody:
{"dashboards":[{"id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000107", "orgId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002", "creatorId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000025", "name":"ExampleOrg Cash Flow 2026", "code":"
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from datetime import date
import calendar

st.set_page_config(page_title="ExampleOrg Cash Flow 2026", layout="wide")

df = dashboard_cashflow.copy()
df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'])
df['month'] = df['date'].dt.to_period('M').astype(str)

proj           = dashboard_projection.copy()
outstanding    = dashboard_outstanding.copy()
burn_breakdown = dashboard_burn_breakdown.copy()

monthly_burn      = proj['monthly_burn'].iloc[0]
old_monthly_burn  = proj['old_monthly_burn'].iloc[0]
monthly_recurring = proj['monthly_recurring_revenue'].iloc[0]
monthly_surplus   = monthly_recurring - monthly_burn
opening_cash      = proj['opening_cash'].iloc[0]

current_month = date.today().strftime('%Y-%m')
days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(date.today().year, date.today().month)[1]
days_elapsed  = date.today().day
pct_elapsed   = days_elapsed / days_in_month

# ── Sidebar filters (global) ─────────────────────────────────────
st.sidebar.title("Filters")
months_avail      = sorted(df['month'].unique())
selected_months   = st.sidebar.multiselect("Month(s)", months_avail, default=months_avail)
accounts_avail    = sorted(df['account'].unique())
selected_accounts = st.sidebar.multiselect("Account(s)", accounts_avail, default=accounts_avail)

df_f = df[df['month'].isin(selected_months) & df['account'].isin(selected_accounts)]

total_in   = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Income']['signed_amount'].sum()
total_out  = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Expense']['amount'].sum()
net        = total_in - total_out
total_ar   = outstanding['balance'].sum()
overdue_ar = outstanding[outstanding['status'] == 'overdue']['balance'].sum()

# ── Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
st.title("ExampleOrg Cash Flow Dashboard — 2026")
st.caption("Cash basis | Sources: Example Checking, Example Business Checking, B. Example Credit Card")

c1, c2, c3, c4, c5 = st.columns(5)
c1.metric("Total Cash In (YTD)",  f"${total_in:,.0f}")
c2.metric("Total Cash Out (YTD)", f"${total_out:,.0f}")
c3.metric("Net Cash Flow (YTD)",  f"${net:,.0f}")
c4.metric("Outstanding AR",       f"${total_ar:,.0f}",
          delta=f"${overdue_ar:,.0f} overdue", delta_color="inverse")
c5.metric("Monthly Burn Rate",    f"${monthly_burn:,.0f}",
          delta=f"↓ ${old_monthly_burn - monthly_burn:,.0f}/mo vs prior", delta_color="normal")

st.divider()

tab1, tab2, tab3, tab4, tab5 = st.tabs([
    "Cash Flow", "Expenses", "Income", "Receivables", "Runway & Forecast"
])

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAB 1 — CASH FLOW
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
with tab1:
    st.subheader("Monthly Cash Flow — Actuals")
    monthly_in  = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Income'].groupby('month')['signed_amount'].sum()
    monthly_out = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Expense'].groupby('month')['amount'].sum()
    all_months  = sorted(set(monthly_in.index) | set(monthly_out.index))
    monthly_df  = pd.DataFrame({
        'month':    all_months,
        'Cash In':  [monthly_in.get(m, 0) for m in all_months],
        'Cash Out': [monthly_out.get(m, 0) for m in all_months],
    })
    monthly_df['Net']        = monthly_df['Cash In'] - monthly_df['Cash Out']
    monthly_df['Cumulative'] = monthly_df['Net'].cumsum()

    col1, col2 = st.columns(2)
    with col1:
        st.markdown("**Monthly Cash In vs. Out**")
        fig_bar = go.Figure()
        fig_bar.add_bar(x=monthly_df['month'], y=monthly_df['Cash In'],  name='Cash In',  marker_color='#2ecc71')
        fig_bar.add_bar(x=monthly_df['month'], y=monthly_df['Cash Out'], name='Cash Out', marker_color='#e74c3c')
        fig_bar.update_layout(barmode='group', height=340,
            yaxis_tickprefix='$', yaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02),
            margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=30, b=10),
            plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
        fig_bar.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_bar.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_bar, use_container_width=True)

    with col2:
        st.markdown("**Cumulative Net Cash Flow**")
        fig_cum = go.Figure()
        fig_cum.add_trace(go.Bar(x=monthly_df['month'], y=monthly_df['Net'], name='Monthly Net',
            marker_color=['#2ecc71' if v >= 0 else '#e74c3c' for v in monthly_df['Net']], opacity=0.5))
        fig_cum.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=monthly_df['month'], y=monthly_df['Cumulative'],
            name='Cumulative', mode='lines+markers',
            line=dict(color='#2c3e50', width=3), marker=dict(size=8)))
        fig_cum.add_hline(y=0, line_dash='dash', line_color='gray', line_width=1)
        fig_cum.update_layout(height=340, yaxis_tickprefix='$', yaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02),
            margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=30, b=10),
            plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
        fig_cum.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_cum.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_cum, use_container_width=True)

    st.divider()
    st.subheader("Transaction Detail")
    flow_filter = st.radio("Show", ["All", "Income", "Expense"], horizontal=True, key="cf_radio")
    df_table = df_f.copy()
    if flow_filter != "All":
        df_table = df_table[df_table['flow_type'] == flow_filter]
    df_display = df_table[['date','account','flow_type','payee','category','transaction_type_formatted','amount']].copy()
    df_display['date']   = df_display['date'].dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    df_display['amount'] = df_display['amount'].apply(lambda x: f"${x:,.2f}")
    df_display.columns   = ['Date','Account','Type','Payee','Category','Transaction Type','Amount']
    st.dataframe(df_display.sort_values('Date', ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True),
                 use_container_width=True, height=420)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAB 2 — EXPENSES
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
with tab2:
    st.subheader("Expense Breakdown")
    col3, col4 = st.columns(2)
    with col3:
        st.markdown("**Total Expenses by Category**")
        exp_cat = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Expense'].groupby('category')['amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=True)
        exp_cat = exp_cat[exp_cat > 0]
        fig_cat = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=exp_cat.values, y=exp_cat.index, orientation='h', marker_color='#e74c3c',
            text=[f"${v:,.0f}" for v in exp_cat.values], textposition='outside'))
        fig_cat.update_layout(height=460, xaxis_tickprefix='$', xaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            margin=dict(l=10, r=90, t=10, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
        fig_cat.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_cat.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_cat, use_container_width=True)
    with col4:
        st.markdown("**Expense Category Mix**")
        exp_pie = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Expense'].groupby('category')['amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
        exp_pie = exp_pie[exp_pie > 0]
        fig_pie = px.pie(values=exp_pie.values, names=exp_pie.index,
            color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set2, hole=0.4)
        fig_pie.update_traces(textposition='inside', textinfo='percent+label')
        fig_pie.update_layout(height=460, showlegend=False, margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=10, b=10))
        st.plotly_chart(fig_pie, use_container_width=True)

    st.divider()
    st.markdown("**Expense Category Trend by Month**")
    exp_trend = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Expense'].groupby(['month','category'])['amount'].sum().reset_index()
    top_cats  = exp_trend.groupby('category')['amount'].sum().nlargest(8).index.tolist()
    fig_trend = px.bar(exp_trend[exp_trend['category'].isin(top_cats)],
        x='month', y='amount', color='category', barmode='stack',
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set2)
    fig_trend.update_layout(height=380, yaxis_tickprefix='$', yaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
        legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, font=dict(size=10)),
        margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=40, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
    fig_trend.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
    fig_trend.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
    st.plotly_chart(fig_trend, use_container_width=True)

    st.divider()
    st.subheader("Forward Burn Rate Breakdown")
    st.caption("Salaries, payroll taxes, and insurance use corrected forward estimates. IT uses Feb/Mar avg. All others use 3-month average.")
    b1, b2 = st.columns([3, 2])
    with b1:
        bd = burn_breakdown.copy()
        bd['monthly_amount'] = bd['monthly_amount'].apply(lambda x: f"${x:,.2f}")
        bd.columns = ['Category', 'Monthly Amount', 'Basis']
        def highlight_updated(row):
            return ['background-color: #eafaf1'] * len(row) if any(k in row['Basis'] for k in ['March','Feb/Mar','example-insurer-1']) else [''] * len(row)
        st.dataframe(bd.style.apply(highlight_updated, axis=1), use_container_width=True, height=460)
    with b2:
        fig_burn = go.Figure(go.Bar(
            x=burn_breakdown['monthly_amount'], y=burn_breakdown['category'], orientation='h',
            marker_color=['#27ae60' if any(k in b for k in ['March','Feb/Mar','example-insurer-1']) else '#e74c3c'
                          for b in burn_breakdown['basis']],
            text=[f"${v:,.0f}" for v in burn_breakdown['monthly_amount']], textposition='outside'))
        fig_burn.update_layout(height=460, xaxis_tickprefix='$', xaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            margin=dict(l=10, r=80, t=30, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white',
            title=dict(text='Green = corrected forward estimate', font=dict(size=11), x=0))
        fig_burn.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_burn.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_burn, use_container_width=True)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAB 3 — INCOME
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
with tab3:
    st.subheader("Income Breakdown")
    col5, col6 = st.columns(2)
    with col5:
        st.markdown("**Cash Received by Customer**")
        inc_cust = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Income'].groupby('payee')['signed_amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=True)
        inc_cust = inc_cust[inc_cust > 0]
        fig_cust = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=inc_cust.values, y=inc_cust.index, orientation='h', marker_color='#2ecc71',
            text=[f"${v:,.0f}" for v in inc_cust.values], textposition='outside'))
        fig_cust.update_layout(height=420, xaxis_tickprefix='$', xaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            margin=dict(l=10, r=90, t=10, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
        fig_cust.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_cust.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_cust, use_container_width=True)
    with col6:
        st.markdown("**Income by Customer — Mix**")
        fig_inc_pie = px.pie(values=inc_cust.values, names=inc_cust.index,
            color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Pastel, hole=0.4)
        fig_inc_pie.update_traces(textposition='inside', textinfo='percent+label')
        fig_inc_pie.update_layout(height=420, showlegend=False, margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=10, b=10))
        st.plotly_chart(fig_inc_pie, use_container_width=True)

    st.divider()
    st.markdown("**Monthly Income by Customer**")
    inc_trend = df_f[df_f['flow_type'] == 'Income'].groupby(['month','payee'])['signed_amount'].sum().reset_index()
    inc_trend = inc_trend[inc_trend['signed_amount'] > 0]
    fig_inc_trend = px.bar(inc_trend, x='month', y='signed_amount', color='payee',
        barmode='stack', color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Set1)
    fig_inc_trend.update_layout(height=380, yaxis_tickprefix='$', yaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
        legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, font=dict(size=10)),
        margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=40, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
    fig_inc_trend.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
    fig_inc_trend.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
    st.plotly_chart(fig_inc_trend, use_container_width=True)

    st.divider()
    st.markdown("**Active Recurring Revenue (MRR)**")
    mrr_col1, mrr_col2 = st.columns([1, 2])
    with mrr_col1:
        st.metric("Total Active MRR", f"${monthly_recurring:,.0f}/mo")
        st.metric("vs. Burn Rate",    f"${monthly_surplus:,.0f}/mo",
                  delta_color="normal" if monthly_surplus >= 0 else "inverse")
    with mrr_col2:
        mrr_data = pd.DataFrame([
            {'Customer': 'example-client-19',                   'Monthly': 6600},
            {'Customer': 'example-client-redacted',                        'Monthly': 5589},
            {'Customer': 'example-client-redacted', 'Monthly': 4800},
            {'Customer': 'example-client-redacted',       'Monthly': 4800},
            {'Customer': 'example-client-redacted Films',                   'Monthly': 4200},
            {'Customer': 'example-client-redacted',    'Monthly': 4200},
        ])
        mrr_data['Monthly'] = mrr_data['Monthly'].apply(lambda x: f"${x:,.0f}")
        st.dataframe(mrr_data, use_container_width=True, hide_index=True)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAB 4 — RECEIVABLES
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
with tab4:
    st.subheader("Outstanding Receivables")
    ar1, ar2 = st.columns([2, 1])
    with ar1:
        disp = outstanding.copy()
        disp['balance']      = disp['balance'].apply(lambda x: f"${x:,.2f}")
        disp['status']       = disp['status'].str.upper()
        disp['days_overdue'] = disp['days_overdue'].apply(lambda x: f"{x} days" if x > 0 else "—")
        disp.columns = ['Invoice #','Customer','Balance','Due Date','Status','Days Overdue']
        def highlight_status(row):
            return ['background-color: #fdecea'] * len(row) if row['Status'] == 'OVERDUE' else [''] * len(row)
        st.dataframe(disp.style.apply(highlight_status, axis=1), use_container_width=True, height=420)
    with ar2:
        overdue_amt = outstanding[outstanding['status'] == 'overdue']['balance'].sum()
        sent_amt    = outstanding[outstanding['status'] == 'sent']['balance'].sum()
        st.metric("Total Outstanding", f"${total_ar:,.2f}")
        st.metric("Overdue",           f"${overdue_amt:,.2f}", delta="Needs attention", delta_color="inverse")
        st.metric("Sent / Pending",    f"${sent_amt:,.2f}")

    st.divider()
    col_ar3, col_ar4 = st.columns(2)
    with col_ar3:
        st.markdown("**AR by Customer**")
        ar_cust = outstanding.groupby('customer')['balance'].sum().sort_values(ascending=True)
        fig_ar = go.Figure(go.Bar(
            x=ar_cust.values, y=ar_cust.index, orientation='h',
            marker_color=['#e74c3c' if outstanding[outstanding['customer']==c]['status'].iloc[0]=='overdue'
                          else '#f39c12' for c in ar_cust.index],
            text=[f"${v:,.0f}" for v in ar_cust.values], textposition='outside'))
        fig_ar.update_layout(height=380, xaxis_tickprefix='$', xaxis_tickformat=',.0f',
            margin=dict(l=10, r=90, t=10, b=10), plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white',
            title=dict(text='Red = overdue | Orange = sent/pending', font=dict(size=10)))
        fig_ar.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
        fig_ar.update_yaxes(gridcolor='#f0f0f0')
        st.plotly_chart(fig_ar, use_container_width=True)
    with col_ar4:
        st.markdown("**AR Status Mix**")
        ar_status = outstanding.groupby('status')['balance'].sum()
        fig_ar_pie = px.pie(values=ar_status.values,
            names=[s.upper() for s in ar_status.index],
            color_discrete_map={'OVERDUE': '#e74c3c', 'SENT': '#f39c12'}, hole=0.4)
        fig_ar_pie.update_traces(textposition='inside', textinfo='percent+label+value')
        fig_ar_pie.update_layout(height=380, margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=10, b=10))
        st.plotly_chart(fig_ar_pie, use_container_width=True)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# TAB 5 — RUNWAY & FORECAST
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
with tab5:
    st.subheader("Full Year Runway & Forecast (2026)")

    # ── Current month actuals (in-progress) ─────────────────────
    df_cur = df[df['month'] == current_month]
    cur_actual_expense = df_cur[df_cur['flow_type'] == 'Expense']['amount'].sum()
    cur_actual_income  = df_cur[df_cur['flow_type'] == 'Income']['signed_amount'].sum()
    cur_remaining_exp  = max(0, monthly_burn - cur_actual_expense)
    cur_remaining_inc  = max(0, monthly_recurring - cur_actual_income)

    # ── Month-in-progress callout ────────────────────────────────
    st.markdown(f"### {date.today().strftime('%B %Y')} — Month in Progress ({days_elapsed}/{days_in_month} days, {pct_elapsed:.0%} elapsed)")
    ip1, ip2, ip3, ip4 = st.columns(4)

    exp_pace = (cur_actual_expense / pct_elapsed) if pct_elapsed > 0 else 0
    inc_pace = (cur_actual_income  / pct_elapsed) if pct_elapsed > 0 else 0
    exp_vs_forecast = exp_pace - monthly_burn
    inc_vs_forecast = inc_pace - monthly_recurring

    ip1.metric("Actual Spend So Far", f"${cur_actual_expense:,.0f}",
        delta=f"{cur_actual_expense/monthly_burn:.0%} of ${monthly_burn:,.0f} forecast", delta_color="off")
    ip2.metric("Remaining Forecast Spend", f"${cur_remaining_exp:,.0f}",
        delta=f"Paced at ${exp_pace:,.0f}/mo ({'+' if exp_vs_forecast>=0 else ''}{exp_vs_forecast:,.0f} vs forecast)",
        delta_color="inverse" if exp_vs_forecast > 2000 else "normal")
    ip3.metric("Actual Income So Far", f"${cur_actual_income:,.0f}",
        delta=f"{cur_actual_income/monthly_recurring:.0%} of ${monthly_recurring:,.0f} MRR", delta_color="off")
    ip4.metric("Remaining Expected Income", f"${cur_remaining_inc:,.0f}",
        delta=f"Paced at ${inc_pace:,.0f}/mo ({'+' if inc_vs_forecast>=0 else ''}{inc_vs_forecast:,.0f} vs MRR)",
        delta_color="normal" if inc_vs_forecast >= 0 else "inverse")

    st.divider()

    # ── Scenario controls ────────────────────────────────────────
    st.markdown("### Scenario Settings")
    sc1, sc2, sc3 = st.columns(3)

    with sc1:
        st.markdown("**Revenue Adjustments**")
        ar_collected = st.slider("Outstanding AR collected in current month ($)",
            min_value=0, max_value=int(total_ar), value=int(total_ar), step=1000, format="$%d")
        new_contract_mrr = st.number_input("New contract MRR ($/mo)", min_value=0, max_value=50000, value=0, step=500)
        new_contract_start = st.selectbox("New contract starts",
            ['2026-04','2026-05','2026-06','2026-07','2026-08','2026-09'], index=1)

    with sc2:
        st.markdown("**Reactivate Stopped Contracts**")
        reactivate_thompson = st.checkbox("example-client-redacted (+$1,000/mo)", value=False)
        reactivate_hinge    = st.checkbox("example-client-redacted (+$4,800/mo)", value=False)
        reactivate_matbank  = st.checkbox("example-client-redacted (+$2,500/mo)", value=False)

    with sc3:
        st.markdown("**Expense Adjustments**")
        expense_reduction = st.slider("Monthly expense reduction ($)", min_value=0, max_value=10000, value=0, step=250, format="$%d")
        ar_delay_months   = st.slider("AR collection delay (months)", min_value=0, max_value=3, value=0, step=1)

    st.divider()

    # ── Build scenario projection ────────────────────────────────
    reactivated_mrr = (
        (1000 if reactivate_thompson else 0) +
        (4800 if reactivate_hinge    else 0) +
        (2500 if reactivate_matbank  else 0)
    )
    scenario_burn = monthly_burn - expense_reduction

    forecast_months_all = ['2026-04','2026-05','2026-06','2026-07','2026-08',
                           '2026-09','2026-10','2026-11','2026-12']
    ar_month_idx = ar_delay_months

    scenario_rows = []
    for i, m in enumerate(forecast_months_all):
        ar_boost       = ar_collected if i == ar_month_idx else 0
        contract_boost = new_contract_mrr if m >= new_contract_start else 0
        total_income   = monthly_recurring + reactivated_mrr + contract_boost + ar_boost
        scenario_rows.append({
            'month': m, 'Income': round(total_income, 2),
            'Expense': round(scenario_burn, 2),
            'Net': round(total_income - scenario_burn, 2), 'is_forecast': True
        })

    base_rows = []
    for i, m in enumerate(forecast_months_all):
        ar_boost    = total_ar if i == 0 else 0
        base_income = monthly_recurring + ar_boost
        base_rows.append({
            'month': m, 'Income': round(base_income, 2),
            'Expense': round(monthly_burn, 2),
            'Net': round(base_income - monthly_burn, 2),
        })

    actuals_rows = proj[~proj['is_forecast']][['month','Income','Expense','Net']].to_dict('records')

    all_scenario = actuals_rows + scenario_rows
    df_scenario  = pd.DataFrame(all_scenario)
    df_scenario['Cumulative_Net']  = df_scenario['Net'].cumsum()
    df_scenario['Cumulative_Cash'] = opening_cash + df_scenario['Net'].cumsum()

    all_base = actuals_rows + base_rows
    df_base  = pd.DataFrame(all_base)
    df_base['Cumulative_Net']  = df_base['Net'].cumsum()
    df_base['Cumulative_Cash'] = opening_cash + df_base['Net'].cumsum()

    # ── Scenario KPIs ────────────────────────────────────────────
    scenario_year_end_cash = df_scenario['Cumulative_Cash'].iloc[-1]
    base_year_end_cash     = df_base['Cumulative_Cash'].iloc[-1]
    scenario_mrr_total     = monthly_recurring + reactivated_mrr + new_contract_mrr
    scenario_surplus       = scenario_mrr_total - scenario_burn

    k1, k2, k3, k4, k5 = st.columns(5)
    k1.metric("Opening Cash (Jan 1)", f"${opening_cash:,.0f}", delta="Dec 31, 2025 balance", delta_color="off")
    k2.metric("Scenario MRR", f"${scenario_mrr_total:,.0f}/mo",
              delta=f"+${reactivated_mrr + new_contract_mrr:,.0f} vs base" if reactivated_mrr + new_contract_mrr > 0 else "Base MRR")
    k3.metric("Scenario Burn Rate", f"${scenario_burn:,.0f}/mo",
              delta=f"-${expense_reduction:,.0f} vs base" if expense_reduction > 0 else "No change")
    k4.metric("Monthly Surplus/Deficit", f"${scenario_surplus:,.0f}/mo",
              delta=f"{'+' if scenario_surplus >= 0 else ''}{scenario_surplus - monthly_surplus:,.0f} vs base",
              delta_color="normal" if scenario_surplus >= monthly_surplus else "inverse")
    k5.metric("Year-End Cash Balance", f"${scenario_year_end_cash:,.0f}",
              delta=f"{'+' if scenario_year_end_cash >= base_year_end_cash else ''}{scenario_year_end_cash - base_year_end_cash:,.0f} vs base",
              delta_color="normal" if scenario_year_end_cash >= base_year_end_cash else "inverse")

    st.divider()

    # ── Runway chart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    actuals_proj_df  = pd.DataFrame(actuals_rows)
    forecast_proj_df = pd.DataFrame(scenario_rows)

    fig_runway = go.Figure()

    # Closed month actuals (solid)
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=actuals_proj_df['month'], y=actuals_proj_df['Income'],
        name='Actual Cash In', marker_color='#2ecc71', opacity=0.85))
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=actuals_proj_df['month'], y=actuals_proj_df['Expense'],
        name='Actual Cash Out', marker_color='#e74c3c', opacity=0.85))

    # Current month — actual posted (solid)
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=[current_month], y=[cur_actual_income],
        name='Current Month: Actual In', marker_color='#27ae60', opacity=0.9,
        marker_line=dict(color='#1a7a45', width=1.5)))
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=[current_month], y=[cur_actual_expense],
        name='Current Month: Actual Out', marker_color='#c0392b', opacity=0.9,
        marker_line=dict(color='#922b21', width=1.5)))

    # Current month — remaining forecast (hatched)
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=[current_month], y=[cur_remaining_inc],
        name='Current Month: Remaining Forecast In',
        marker_color='#2ecc71', opacity=0.25, marker_pattern_shape='/',
        marker_line=dict(color='#27ae60', width=1)))
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=[current_month], y=[cur_remaining_exp],
        name='Current Month: Remaining Forecast Out',
        marker_color='#e74c3c', opacity=0.25, marker_pattern_shape='/',
        marker_line=dict(color='#c0392b', width=1)))

    # Future forecast bars (hatched)
    future_forecast = forecast_proj_df[forecast_proj_df['month'] > current_month]
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=future_forecast['month'], y=future_forecast['Income'],
        name='Forecast Cash In', marker_color='#2ecc71', opacity=0.4, marker_pattern_shape='/'))
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Bar(x=future_forecast['month'], y=future_forecast['Expense'],
        name='Forecast Cash Out', marker_color='#e74c3c', opacity=0.4, marker_pattern_shape='/'))

    # Base cash balance line (dashed) — includes opening cash
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df_base['month'], y=df_base['Cumulative_Cash'],
        name='Base Cash Balance', mode='lines+markers',
        line=dict(color='#95a5a6', width=2, dash='dash'),
        marker=dict(size=5), yaxis='y2'))

    # Scenario cash balance line (solid) — includes opening cash
    fig_runway.add_trace(go.Scatter(
        x=df_scenario['month'], y=df_scenario['Cumulative_Cash'],
        name='Scenario Cash Balance', mode='lines+markers',
        line=dict(color='#2c3e50', width=3),
        marker=dict(size=7), yaxis='y2'))

    # Zero line on right axis = cash runs out
    fig_runway.add_hline(y=0, line_dash='dot', line_color='#e74c3c', line_width=1.5,
        annotation_text='Cash = $0', annotation_position='right',
        annotation_font_color='#e74c3c', yref='y2')

    # Shade forecast region
    fig_runway.add_vrect(x0=current_month, x1='2026-12',
        fillcolor='#f0f4ff', opacity=0.2, layer='below', line_width=0,
        annotation_text='Forecast', annotation_position='top left',
        annotation_font_color='#7f8c8d')

    # Annotate current month
    fig_runway.add_annotation(x=current_month, y=monthly_burn * 1.05,
        text=f"In Progress<br>{days_elapsed}/{days_in_month} days",
        showarrow=False, font=dict(size=10, color='#7f8c8d'),
        bgcolor='white', bordercolor='#bdc3c7', borderwidth=1)

    fig_runway.update_layout(
        barmode='stack', height=540,
        yaxis=dict(title='Monthly Amount ($)', tickprefix='$', tickformat=',.0f', gridcolor='#f0f0f0'),
        yaxis2=dict(title='Cash Balance ($)', tickprefix='$', tickformat=',.0f',
                    overlaying='y', side='right', zeroline=True, zerolinecolor='#e74c3c', zerolinewidth=1.5),
        legend=dict(orientation='h', yanchor='bottom', y=1.02, font=dict(size=9)),
        margin=dict(l=10, r=10, t=60, b=10),
        plot_bgcolor='white', paper_bgcolor='white')
    fig_runway.update_xaxes(showgrid=False)
    st.plotly_chart(fig_runway, use_container_width=True)

    # ── Runway insight ───────────────────────────────────────────
    first_neg_scenario = df_scenario[df_scenario['Cumulative_Cash'] < 0]
    first_neg_base     = df_base[df_base['Cumulative_Cash'] < 0]

    col_msg1, col_msg2 = st.columns(2)
    with col_msg1:
        st.markdown("**Base Scenario**")
        base_neg = first_neg_base[first_neg_base['month'] > current_month]
        if len(base_neg) > 0:
            st.warning(f"Base: cash runs out in **{base_neg.iloc[0]['month']}** | Year-end balance: **${base_year_end_cash:,.0f}**")
        else:
            st.success(f"Base: cash positive all year | Year-end balance: **${base_year_end_cash:,.0f}**")
    with col_msg2:
        st.markdown("**Your Scenario**")
        scen_neg = first_neg_scenario[first_neg_scenario['month'] > current_month]
        if len(scen_neg) > 0:
            st.warning(f"Scenario: cash runs out in **{scen_neg.iloc[0]['month']}** | Year-end balance: **${scenario_year_end_cash:,.0f}**")
        else:
            st.success(f"Scenario: cash positive all year | Year-end balance: **${scenario_year_end_cash:,.0f}**")

    st.divider()

    # ── Monthly detail table ─────────────────────────────────────
    st.markdown("**Monthly Projection Detail**")

    detail_rows = []
    for _, row in df_scenario.iterrows():
        m = row['month']
        base_row = df_base[df_base['month'] == m]
        base_cash = base_row['Cumulative_Cash'].values[0] if len(base_row) > 0 else 0
        if m == current_month:
            detail_rows.append({
                'Month': m + ' (in progress)',
                'Cash In':       f"${cur_actual_income:,.0f} actual + ${cur_remaining_inc:,.0f} remaining",
                'Cash Out':      f"${cur_actual_expense:,.0f} actual + ${cur_remaining_exp:,.0f} remaining",
                'Net':           f"${row['Net']:,.0f} (forecast)",
                'Scenario Cash Balance': f"${row['Cumulative_Cash']:,.0f}",
                'Base Cash Balan…<truncated>
